title: calea verticillata
intro: Calea verticillata, also known as bat flower or Mexican cigar plant, is a flowering plant native to Mexico, characterized by its unique, cigar-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calea verticillata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Calea verticillata are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
